data.revised_prompt: Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a solid #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. Exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. No visible grid lines, no borders, no text. Subject: cute Q-version melee enemy for Samsara Ascension, chibi corrupted xianxia raider, big head, small body, dark red armor, tiny blade kept close, mischievous hostile expression, rounded but readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 58 to 66 percent of each cell. Animation is combat with real body pose changes only: top-left frame wind-up/casting wind-up, body crouches or coils, weapon/focus/energy pulls close; top-right frame compact strike/swipe/shot release, body lunges or snaps forward while effects stay tight; bottom-left frame follow-through with clear recoil and cloth/hair/flame momentum, no wide detached effect; bottom-right frame guard or recovery pose, ready to loop back into combat. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes, costume/armor marks, weapon, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. Containment: entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing crosses a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. Clean hand-painted fantasy RPG sprite sheet style, crisp edges, readable silhouette, consistent lighting, no shadow, no floor, no gradients, no texture. Four distinct combat frames with stable scale and alignment, animated sprite sheet layout.
